themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 8 verses. Commentary leans on "How shall we do for wives for them that remain, seeing we have sworn by the LORD that we will...". Word-study detail reinforces "הַשְּׁבוּעָ֨ה: oath - properly, something sworn, i.e., an oath".
